summary: Iteration 12 regression testing completed. Backend: 22/24 tests passed (91.67%). Model fixes for KinshipCreateRequest (related_to_name, relationship_scope) and SubyardCreateRequest (role_focus) are WORKING. All CRUD operations for subyards, kinship, announcements, budgets verified. TravelPlanCreateRequest model has MISMATCH with server expectations. Frontend: All pages load correctly, delete buttons visible for subyards (3), announcements (1). Polls page renders correctly with voting UI.

critical.issue: Model/Server mismatch - TravelPlanCreateRequest model has (traveler_name, mode, origin, notes, estimated_cost) but server CREATE endpoint expects (title, travel_type, details, coordinator_name, amount_estimate, seats_available). Also requires valid event_id.
critical.root_cause: Server create_travel_plan() at line 1783-1796 uses different field names than the model defines. Model fields are used in PUT but not POST.

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Align TravelPlanCreateRequest model with server.py create_travel_plan() expectations - either update model to have (title, travel_type, details, coordinator_name, amount_estimate, seats_available) OR update server to use model fields (traveler_name, mode, origin, notes, estimated_cost)
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED FIXED: KinshipCreateRequest now has related_to_name and relationship_scope fields - POST /api/kinship works
VERIFIED FIXED: SubyardCreateRequest now has role_focus field - POST/PUT /api/subyards works
BUG: TravelPlanCreateRequest model fields don't match server.py create_travel_plan() - server uses payload.title, payload.travel_type, payload.details but model has traveler_name, mode, origin
INCONSISTENCY: PUT /api/travel-plans uses model fields (traveler_name, mode) but POST uses different fields (title, travel_type) - schema needs alignment

success_rate.backend: 91.67% (22/24 passed, 1 failed due to model bug, 1 skipped)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load, delete buttons visible, forms functional

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create disposable communities via /api/auth/bootstrap with TEST_ITER12_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified model fixes for KinshipCreateRequest and SubyardCreateRequest - both now work correctly. TravelPlanCreateRequest still has model/server mismatch requiring fix. Frontend delete buttons work for subyards (3 visible), announcements (1 visible). Polls page fully functional. Login flow: /login -> click Sign in tab -> fill email/password -> click Sign in button.

passed: POST /api/subyards creates subyard with role_focus list
POST /api/kinship creates kinship with related_to_name and relationship_scope
Frontend Courtyards page renders with delete buttons
Frontend Funds & Travel page renders with budget form
Frontend Polls page renders correctly with voting UI
failed: POST /api/travel-plans - 404 Event not found (requires valid event_id and has model mismatch)
skipped: DELETE /api/travel-plans/{id} - skipped due to create failure

TravelPlanCreateRequest_model_mismatch.problem: POST /api/travel-plans fails because model fields don't match server expectations
TravelPlanCreateRequest_model_mismatch.fix_recommendation: Update TravelPlanCreateRequest model to match server.py create_travel_plan() field names
